_risk_level_doc: Manifest JSON update only — no hook logic, no test logic, no infrastructure. Affects two JSON files in tests/generated/. No regression risk.

requirement.original: Task 20260526-052559 left a minor gap: tests/generated/20260526-052559/manifest.json is missing entries for test_ac_07_ac07-venv-activate-allowed.py and test_ac_07b_ac07b-forged-arg-blocked.py. These two test files exist on disk and pass via pytest collection, but were added by the test-writer after the manifest was already written (the test-writer registered AC1-AC6 only). The manifest's active_tests array has 6 entries; it should have 8.
requirement.clarified: Append two manifest entries to tests/generated/20260526-052559/manifest.json active_tests array — one for ac-07 (venv-activate-allowed, exit 0) and one for ac-07b (forged-arg-blocked, exit 2 + stderr token). Verify global manifest already has the task entry.
requirement.what: Add ac-07 and ac-07b objects to active_tests in the per-task manifest
requirement.why: QA traceability requires all test files to be registered; two files added post-manifest-write are invisible to manifest consumers

included: tests/generated/manifest.json — read-verify only (task entry already present)
excluded: No changes to global manifest structure

ac-07b entry present with correct ac_uid, file path, hook_check
constraints: New entries must use the same object shape as existing entries
task_id field in each entry must be '20260526-052559'

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed the draft is minimal and correct. One in-scope finding: hook_check objects in the BA draft included extra non-canonical fields (command and description) absent from most existing schema entries. One observation: global manifest already has the task entry, confirming no write is needed.

findings.issue: Draft hook_check objects included command and description fields not present in the canonical minimal schema used by ac-02, ac-03, ac-05 entries
findings.proposed_fix: Drop command and description from both new hook_check objects; use minimal schema: {method, expected_exit} for ac-07 and {method, expected_exit, expected_stderr_token} for ac-07b
findings.rationale: Codex's proposed fix matches the most common existing schema shape and avoids introducing non-canonical extra fields into the manifest

findings.issue: Global manifest already contains the task entry at tests/generated/manifest.json:78-79 so no update is needed
findings.rationale: Confirms BA's read-verify-only conclusion for the global manifest

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied codex fix: removed command and description extra fields from hook_check in new_entries for ac_07 and ac_07b; minimal schema now matches existing canonical entries
